allow: Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('FIELDS:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('streak:', d.get\('streak'\)\); print\('bestTimeBlock:', d.get\('bestTimeBlock'\), '@', d.get\('bestTimeBlockPercent'\),'%'\); print\('bestWeekday:', d.get\('bestWeekday'\), 'score:', d.get\('bestWeekdayScore'\)\); print\('worstWeekday:', d.get\('worstWeekday'\)\); print\('bestPomoDuration:', d.get\('bestPomoDuration'\)\); print\('avgCompletedPomoDuration:', d.get\('avgCompletedPomoDuration'\)\); print\('pomoShortVsLong:', d.get\('pomoShortVsLong'\)\); print\('bestSleepHours:', d.get\('bestSleepHours'\), 'avg:', d.get\('avgSleepHours'\)\); print\('sleepCorrelation:', d.get\('sleepCorrelation'\)\); print\('sleepQualityCorrelation:', d.get\('sleepQualityCorrelation'\)\); print\('habitAverageRate:', d.get\('habitAverageRate'\),'%'\); print\('trend:', d.get\('trend'\)\); print\('timeline len:', len\(d.get\('productivityTimeline',[]\)\)\); print\('quality scores len:', len\(d.get\('qualityScores',[]\)\)\); print\('recs:', len\(d.get\('recommendations',[]\)\),'recommendations'\); print\('totals:', d.get\('totalTasksDone'\),'tasks,', d.get\('totalPomoDone'\),'pomos,', d.get\('totalFocusMin'\),'min focus'\)")
